name: Chicken Breasts Diane
recipeIngredient: 4 Large Boneless Chicken Breast Halves or 8 small
3 tbsp Chopped Fresh Chives or Green Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breast halves between sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap with a mallet.
2. Sprinkle salt and black pepper over the chicken.
3. Heat olive oil and butter in a large skillet.
4. Cook the chicken for 4 minutes on each side, ensuring it is cooked through but not overcooked and dry.
5. Transfer the chicken to a warm serving platter.
6. Add chives or green onions, lime juice, brandy (if used), parsley, and mustard to the pan.
7. Cook for 15 seconds, whisking constantly.
8. Whisk in the broth until the sauce is smooth.
9. Stir the mixture and continue whisking until the sauce thickens.
10. Whisk in the remaining butter and oil.
11. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve immediately.
